name: Front
description: Shared inbox and customer communication platform for teams (email, chat, social) with APIs and SDKs to integrate and extend Front.

auth_methods.note: Official developer docs state Front supports API tokens (used as Bearer tokens) and OAuth 2.0 (authorization code flow).

credential_access.note: Help Center shows developers can create personal API tokens from Settings > Company > Developers (no human approval or paid plan mentioned). OAuth apps can be created similarly per https://help.front.com/en/articles/2355. No public doc states a paid plan is required to obtain credentials.

api_surface.note: Developer portal lists Core API (REST) and reference; the site includes REST API reference and guides covering many product objects (tickets, conversations, contacts, webhooks, etc.).

buildability.note: Public docs and self-serve token/OAuth creation exist, so a developer can obtain credentials and use the REST API immediately. Rate limits apply and may require contacting sales for higher limits per https://help.front.com/en/articles/2438.

queries: dev.frontapp.com Front Developer Portal API docs root
Front API authentication site:dev.frontapp.com OR site:help.front.com "authentication" "API" "Front"
How to create and revoke API tokens site:help.front.com
Create an OAuth app in Front site:help.front.com
